title: Sweet Surprise
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Sweet Surprise''''' was a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] vessel, aboard which [[Plaan]] was first mate, that plied its trade during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. It was a blocky-shaped craft that measured a [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometer]] in length. In [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] were intent on rendezvousing with the ''[[Errant Venture/Legends|Errant Venture]]'' at [[Nova Station]] near [[Carida/Legends|Carida]]. When the ''Venture'' failed to show, the two instead ran into Plaan. There they learned that the [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] had left his post on [[Tholatin]] and had taken on a special assignment to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

Trusting their instincts, they warned [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and [[General/Legends|General]] [[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Carlist Rieekan]] of their suspicions. When the ''Surprise'' attempted to slip into Coruscant's passenger lanes, [[Gavin Darklighter]] and [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] intercepted it.

The vessel was found to be smuggling deadly [[voxyn]] onto Coruscant in an attempt to hunt down and kill the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] leadership. The plan was thwarted by the Solos and [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] Darklighter and the ''Surprise'' was successfully boarded and captured. The vessel would later be thoroughly inspected by [[Hivrekh'wao'Cheklev|Cheklev]] as part of the [[Jedi healer/Legends|Jedi healer]] [[Cilghal]]'s efforts to discern the location of origination for the voxyn.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}}
